title: stachys gilliesii
intro: Stachys gilliesii, also known as the Pink Betony or Western Stachys, is a perennial herb native to Australia, characterized by its pink or purple flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce inflammation. Studies have shown that Stachys gilliesii extracts exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, providing potential health benefits such as reducing anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
